publicInvite.dbErrorDesc: Could not reach the database. Please try again later.
publicInvite.notFoundDesc: This invitation is no longer available or the link is invalid. Ask the person who invited you for a new link.
publicInvite.acceptedDesc: This invitation was already accepted. You can access the company from your dashboard.
publicInvite.declinedDesc: This invitation was declined earlier. Contact the inviter if you need a new one.
publicInvite.revokedDesc: This invitation was cancelled by the person who sent it.
publicInvite.expiredDesc: This invitation has expired. Request a new invitation.
publicInvite.inviteTitle: {company} invited you to join their RiskNova workspace.
publicInvite.loginPrompt: To accept the invitation, you need an account registered to {email}.

publicInviteActions.emailMismatch: This invitation was sent to {inviteeEmail}, but you are signed in as {currentUserEmail}.
publicInviteActions.emailMismatchHint: Please sign in with the correct account to accept.
publicInviteActions.declinedMessage: You declined the invitation. You can request a new one anytime.
publicInviteActions.errNotPending: This invitation is no longer pending (it may have been accepted, declined, or cancelled).
publicInviteActions.errWrongUser: This invitation does not belong to the signed-in user. Sign in with the correct account.
publicInviteActions.errAuthRequired: You must be signed in to accept the invitation.

certificateVerify.verifiedSubtitle: This certificate has been verified by RiskNova.
